description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and a prominent, textured brown stem on top. The front face is intricately carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with a missing tooth, giving it a mischievous expression. The carving exposes the hollow interior, suggesting the pumpkin has been scooped out. The back and sides are uncarved, showing the natural, slightly uneven surface of the pumpkin skin with some subtle color variations and blemishes. The stem is thick and slightly curved, adding to the naturalistic appearance. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional embellishments.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a brown stem, featuring a traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The front view displays the carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a wide, jagged mouth.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the pumpkin's uncarved surface and the side profile of the carved mouth opening.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the uncarved, natural pumpkin surface and the full stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the uncarved pumpkin skin and the edge of the mouth cutout.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with a missing tooth. The style is classic and playful, with cutouts for all facial features and no additional motifs or etchings.
